description: A multi-level obfuscation framework (mild, moderate, strong) for privacy-preserving machine learning on network-traffic data. Includes dataset balancing, obfuscation scripts, TabNet models, baseline ML benchmarks, and reproducible experiments.
Context-Adaptive AgentLens Platform Utilizing Dynamic Spatial Awareness and Machine Learning Driven Optimization Framework.
Federated machine learning framework for physical ai oncology trials.
Hybrid quantum-inspired machine learning framework for fair post-HCT survival prediction.

Integrated framework combining advanced discriminant analysis (LDA, QDA, regularized variants), machine learning models (RF, SVM, KNN, boosting, neural networks), and Generalized Logistic Type-IV regression for robust classification, nonlinear modeling, and improved predictive performance evaluation.

A novel IoT-based predictive framework for food spoilage detection integrating multi-sensor hardware prototyping (temperature, humidity, gas sensors) with Random Forest machine learning analysis. The system enables real-time environmental monitoring and early spoilage prediction to reduce supply chain losses and improve food safety.
ytopt: machine-learning-based autotuning and hyperparameter optimization framework using Bayesian Optimization
A curated list of awesome AML attacks and defences frameworks and resources.
A comparative framework for sex ratio estimation in North Sea fish using classical statistics, machine learning, and deep learning.

MLOptimizer is a comprehensive framework for automatically generating optimized machine learning models while capturing detailed hardware performance metrics. It provides a distributed system for model training, hyperparameter optimization, and hardware resource monitoring.

Reinforcement learning framework for agricultural robots using n step and Double DQN policy learning to optimize spraying, planting, and harvesting decisions. Designed for integration with real machine vision pipelines to enable perception driven, resource efficient autonomous farm labor.

This is a repository for Quasi-Analytic Physics-Informed Machine Learning program for solving inverse problems of consolidation (i.e., diffusion PDE). The framework is designed to address field heterogeneity and measurement sparsity, which are major concerns for site characterization tasks in geotechnical engineering.

This research dashboard provides comprehensive analytical and predictive tools for facility management and building engineering. It bridges the gap between raw maintenance logs and actionable intelligence.
Keep track of the newest machine learning frameworks on GitHub
Machine Learning Framework for Fairness Evaluation in Emergency Department Triage Predictions

A project builds a financial state tracking framework for listed companies using financial ratios and unsupervised machine learning techniques. The project focuses on clustering firms by financial characteristics, analyzing state migration over time, and supporting firm screening for research and portfolio management reference.

This is my final year project where I use machine learning to predict the binding success rate between drug molecules and protein targets. I will code the frontend off of the react framework and use a REST API to connect it to the backend - Neural network, Database
A differentiable PDE solving framework for machine learning
A Python-based backtesting framework comparing HODL, DCA, and a 10-factor quantitative strategy on 14 years of Bitcoin data, demonstrating the risks of overfitting in financial machine learning.
An easy-to-use Python package implementing the machine learning framework presented in "Precision culturomics enabled by unlabeled single-cell morphology and Raman spectra"
Open Machine Learning Compiler Framework

Replication code for "A Term Structure Framework for Green Bond Spreads and Portfolio Strategies." Includes R scripts for curve-based green bond yield spread calculation, machine learning-based attribute screening via Association Rule Learning, and green bond portfolio construction and evaluation.

FedEasy is an intuitive powerful yet simple to use Federated Learning framework. Our goal is to streamline the process of setting up and running federated learning experiments with ease, making advanced machine learning techniques accessible to researchers and developers alike.

RESTful API for vector similarity search using the Python web framework FastAPI and a REDIS vector database.  This accelerates machine learning workflows that require vector similarity search using classification models.
Machine Learning framework for slug flow crystallization with uncertainty quantification using NARX and CQR

The **KC-ML framework** integrates biological priors (pathway enrichment and protein-protein interactions) as soft constraints into multi-model machine learning to improve feature stability and cross-cohort generalizability in transcriptomic prediction.

A decentralized framework for AI-based resource allocation in Open RAN optimizes network efficiency. It uses machine learning models, deployed at the network edge, to autonomously manage resources like spectrum and power, enhancing performance and scalability without a central controller.
Production-ready machine learning pipeline framework with automated feature engineering and experiment tracking.

Machine learning framework for multi-class product categorization in e-commerce using structured metadata and textual features. Combines TF-IDF, transformer embeddings (MiniLM), and ensemble models (Logistic Regression, XGBoost, MLP) to predict hierarchical product categories with strong F1 performance.

This repository showcases my journey in Machine Learning, Deep Learning, and Computer Vision  from data preprocessing and model training to real-time deployment using FastAPI, OpenCV, and modern ML frameworks. Each project is built with a focus on performance, explainability, and real-world applicability.
Predict football match outcomes using the W-5 Multi-Agent AI Consensus Framework, achieving high accuracy with a blend of AI and machine learning techniques.
Machine learning framework for mRNA alternative splicing analysis identifies a signature of progression in colorectal adenocarcinoma
A Digital Twin Framework with integrated Machine Learning for simulating the effects of tillage and spatiotemporal straw return practices in ricewheat rotations with AI decision support.
IoT-based Smart Crop Recommendation System using ESP32 sensors, Machine Learning (Random Forest), Flask web framework, and Weather API integration.

A robust framework for formal verification of multi-agent systems powered by LLMs, ensuring safe and reliable decision-making. Integrates machine learning with formal methods to validate agent behaviors, safety constraints, and real-world simulations in critical domains like autonomous driving and robotics.

Machine Learningdriven cybersecurity framework for IoT and smart city networks. Includes intrusion detection using Random Forest, SOC dashboard for monitoring, port scanning for vulnerability detection, IoT device discovery, and network traffic visualization using Python.
Research-grade ASL recognition framework using CNN, SSD MobileNet v2, and TensorFlow Object Detection API for real-time gesture detection.
Hybrid AI model combining Deep and Machine Learning to detect Skin Cancer from Image dataset
Machine learning projects performed using Tensorflow framework.
A machine learning-based framework to distinguish nuclear recoils from electronic backgrounds in gaseous NEWS-G-style detectors.
Empower machines to reason about affordances in new environments with A4-Agent's advanced zero-shot learning framework.

Open-source machine learning framework for Java. Designed with speed and lightweight in mind.
A Three Party MPC framework for Machine learning and Databases

Modular backtesting framework for algorithmic trading using Backtrader. Features a 4-phase state machine strategy, JPY pair P&L correction (ERIS logic), and professional reporting. Educational resource for learning systematic trading.
A compact machine learning framework implemented from scratch using NumPy.
MAILA  a MAchine learning framework for Inferring Latent mental states from digital Activity

Questa repository contiene un framework  per la classificazione e l'analisi di stati quantistici bipartiti. Il progetto mira a distinguere gli stati quantistici in base a due propriet fondamentali: l'Entanglement (tramite il criterio PPT) e la Non-localit (tramite la violazione delle disuguaglianze di Bell).

A Python-based machine learning framework that predicts Tesla's daily stock returns by combining FinBERT transformer sentiment analysis of Elon Musk's tweets with traditional OHLCV technical indicators. The sentiment-enhanced model achieved a statistically significant R improvement of 0.5% over the baseline, validated through bootstrap resampling.

End-to-end ML pipeline for analyzing and mitigating bias in machine learning models. Features bias detection (SPD, EOD, DIR metrics), multiple classifiers (Random Forest, Logistic Regression, SVM), and a configurable YAML-driven training framework.

Machine learning and DJango project that uses ML trained model to predict survival of passengers in historical TITANIC Dataset.  Uses Django framework that uses forms to get passenger details from user and predicts survival using ML model and shows results to user. Prediction details and passenger results are saved in the database.
A Scientific Machine Learning framework combining mechanistic biological models with Deep Learning to discover hidden pharmacodynamics.

This project presents a physics-inspired spacecraft telemetry simulation and anomaly detection framework that models power, thermal, and communication subsystems in Low Earth Orbit. It combines engineering-based thresholds and machine learning to analyze synthetic telemetry and study fault detection and spacecraft health monitoring.

This repository contains a collection of AI and Machine Learning projects built using various libraries and frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, and others. It includes algorithms, models, and applications that demonstrate the power of machine learning and artificial intelligence to solve real-world problems.
Machine learning using python and its frameworks

A general-purpose, domain-agnostic MLOps framework that automates the complete machine learning lifecycle from data versioning to model deployment and monitoring. Built with open-source tools to avoid vendor lock-in and enable reproducible ML workflows.

This repository contains a collection of Machine Learning, Deep Learning, NLP, and LLM-based projects built using Python and modern ML frameworks. The projects demonstrate practical implementation of supervised learning, deep learning architectures, transformer models, and LLM workflows.

This project develops a multimodal machine learning framework to forecast post-meal glucose spikes across multiple horizons of 1, 3, and 6 hours. By utilizing the CGMacros dataset, the system integrates continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) data, nutritional features, clinical biomarkers, and AI-derived food image embeddings.

A modular computational research framework for building, evaluating, and analysing advanced machine learning models in healthcare and cognitive decision-making domains. Includes explainability, uncertainty analysis, and reproducible experimental pipelines.

A joint modeling framework of Multi-Task Learning (MTL) and machine learning for limited sample data is proposed. This method integrates a hybrid neural network model that combines a Multilayer Perceptron and Convolutional Neural Network. It incorporates a cross-stitch structure, MTL, and homoscedastic uncertainty loss weighting mechanism.

Atlas DataFlow  um framework contrato-driven para construo de pipelines analticos modulares, auditveis e adaptveis. Organiza o fluxo de dados em etapas orientadas a domnio, promovendo rastreabilidade, reprodutibilidade e integrao consistente entre anlise de dados, modelagem estatstica e aplicaes de machine learning.
An Explainable Machine Learning Framework for Multi-Class Cyber Threat Detection: A Comparative Analysis of Random Forest and SVM with SHAP
Interpretable machine-learning framework for chronic disease risk prediction using BRFSS survey data (20112015), with reproducible pipelines and Streamlit deployment.
Scientific Machine Learning framework simulating AdS/CFT duality using Fourier Neural Operators.

Framework for building AI agents with real-time adaptive learning capabilities.

A modular machine learning framework for budget execution & data analysis built in Python with Scikit, XGBoost, PyTorch, and TensorFlow.

HRIDYA (Heart Risk Intelligence Driven Yielding Assessment) is a research-oriented hybrid machine learning framework designed to study cardiovascular risk prediction using both classical machine learning models and quantum-inspired learning techniques.

This repository contains the complete analytical pipeline for a study on fish freshness classification. The analysis leverages advanced machine learning methods implemented within the mlr3 framework, enabling robust model training, evaluation, and comparison.

This project provides a robust, machine learning-driven framework for identifying potential insider threats within an organization's digital ecosystem. The system analyzes user behavior, network activity, and data access patterns to proactively flag suspicious activities.AI Explainable Alerts and Role-Based Explanations

Unified digital framework aimed at transforming citizen-generated data into actionable municipal intelligence. The system integrates machine learning techniques for automated issue classification, trend prediction, and anomaly detection, enabling authorities to proactively identify recurring urban issues before they escalate.
From-scratch, modular Neural Network implementation in Go, designed to demonstrate the core mechanics of machine learning without relying on heavy external frameworks.

A machine learning framework, dataset and research sub-module about coevolutionary planetary intelligence dynamics. This project explores how nurturing its emergent patterns may lead to a synergistic increase in the overall capability and intelligence of both individual agents and the collective system.

Real-Time Anomaly Detection in IoT Networks is a streaming analytics framework that monitors IoT device data to detect anomalies, failures, and security threats in real time. It leverages statistical methods and machine learning to identify unusual patterns, trigger alerts, and ensure system reliability, safety, and operational continuity.

A fast, distributed, high performance gradient boosting (GBT, GBDT, GBRT, GBM or MART) framework based on decision tree algorithms, used for ranking, classification and many other machine learning tasks.
